code: import api from"./api";export const getAllAttendance=function(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;return api.get("/attendance",{params:{page}});};export const getMyAttendance=function(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;return api.get("/attendance/my-attendance",{params:{page}});};export const getTodayAttendance=()=>api.get("/attendance/today");export const checkIn=()=>api.post("/attendance/check-in");export const checkOut=()=>api.post("/attendance/check-out");export const getAttendanceStats=()=>api.get("/attendance/stats");
